prompt: Im doing a YC startup take home assignment. I write it down the SPEC.md, I need to do an in deep check of the the file, using the skills to correlate best practices and implementations. use /ai-sdk /vercel-react-best-practices /drizzle-orm /workos /workos-widgets /vercel-composition-patterns /postgres and also, the next version its 16.2.0, and for all other packages, use always @latest tag so we stay up to date.
notes: Deep review of SPEC.md against 8 skill references. Found 21 issues across CRITICAL (6), HIGH (5), MEDIUM (7), LOW (3) categories. Key findings: Next.js 16 needs proxy.ts not middleware.ts, AI Gateway replaces @ai-sdk/openai, UUID v4 PKs cause index fragmentation, missing FK indexes, race condition in user upsert, Sandpack must be lazy-loaded, parsedData JSONB scalability concern, timestamp needs timezone.

prompt: Update SPEC.md with all review findings: Next.js 16.2.0, proxy.ts, UUIDv7, timestamptz, FK indexes, atomic upsert, withAuthHandler HOF, Vercel Blob, Suspense boundaries, lazy-loaded Sandpack, PlanetScale Postgres, AuthKitProvider initialAuth, zod validation, transactions, Promise.all parallelism.
notes: Complete rewrite of SPEC.md applying 18+ corrections across all 16 sections. Key architectural changes: withAuthHandler HOF for SOLID auth, Vercel Blob for file storage (removing parsedData JSONB scalability issue), PlanetScale as DB provider, proxy.ts for Next.js 16, UUIDv7 for index-friendly PKs.

prompt: Deep check of SPEC.md against SOLID principles article, strong typing requirements, and errors-as-values pattern from domain-driven-hexagon repo. Add types/ directory with Result<T,E>, AppError discriminated union, typed component props (ISP), API schemas (zod + interfaces). Add services/ layer returning Result. Add SOLID architecture section mapping each principle to codebase patterns. Updated for React 19 (no forwardRef, use() instead of useContext).
notes: Added 3 new sections to SPEC.md: Section 5 (Types & Interfaces), Section 6 (Error Handling as Values), Section 17 (SOLID Architecture). Added types/ directory with result.ts, errors.ts, api.ts, chat.ts, file.ts, components.ts. Added services/ layer (conversations.ts, messages.ts, files.ts, ai.ts) all returning Result<T,E>. Component props use Interface Segregation - receive only what they render. All sections renumbered (now 19 sections). React 19 patterns: no forwardRef, use() over useContext, ref as regular prop.

prompt: gpt 4.1 mini can read the excel file? check the ai-sdk skill related to file/attachments upload. + ok perfect. continue.
notes: Confirmed gpt-4.1-mini cannot natively read CSV/Excel (only PDFs/images). Current server-side parsing approach is correct. Completed full SPEC.md rewrite to tool-based architecture: replaced regex artifact extraction with AI SDK typed tool parts, added generateArtifact tool with multi-model routing (gpt-4.1-mini analysis → gpt-5.3-codex codegen → gpt-5.4-nano titles), removed ParsedMessage/parse-artifact.ts/artifact DB column, updated all 10 affected sections (2,5,9,10,11,12,13,15,17,18,19).

prompt: check the image, its an example of claude artifacts, how much do you think our architecture and SPEC accurates features this? also check how on the side panel where the sandpack lives, it has a code view too, like you can see the code also.
notes: Compared SPEC to Claude Artifacts screenshot. Added 4 features: (1) Preview/Code toggle in artifact panel via SandpackCodeEditor, renamed artifact-preview to artifact-sandpack. (2) Artifact card inline in chat replacing plain text — styled card with title, icon, Interactive artifact subtitle. (3) Dashboard chartType for multi-chart artifacts with flexible axisMappings array. (4) Collapsible Analysis steps via new analyzeData tool + maxSteps:3 for multi-step chain-of-tools. Updated all affected sections: types/ai.ts, tool definitions, prompts, MessageBubble, ArtifactPanel, layout diagram, data flow, file structure, implementation order.

prompt: I have something on my head: light theme, minimal and clean, not look vibe-coded, with generic shadcn components. I have the fonts with their use cases too and examples images of the chat with different states. its on rebolt-design.md. review EACH image.
notes: Reviewed 5 Rebolt reference images (empty state, input field, sending, analyzing, mid-conversation) and font spec (Inter body, Manrope branding, Geist Mono code). Added Section 13 Visual Design System to SPEC.md covering: typography (3 fonts with roles), color palette (light-only, neutral grays, soft blue accent via Shadcn CSS vars), component styling (input area, messages with blue-tint user bubbles, sidebar, artifact panel, artifact card, empty state, analysis collapsible, file badge), spacing/layout rules, and state visual treatments. Renumbered all subsequent sections 13-19 → 14-20.

prompt: I think that right now the artifact its bias to generating only charts? confirm me this. And It should be general, heres a clear example: examples/ (vacation tracker Excel → PTO Dashboard webapp). The capabilities should be more than just charts. Confirm this bias. + yes lets do that re write.
notes: Confirmed heavy chart bias across 12+ locations in SPEC. Rewrote to general-purpose artifact system: removed chartType enum and axisMappings from tool schema (now just title+description), rewrote both prompts (analysis prompt covers charts/tables/trackers/calendars/forms/kanban, codegen prompt has UI Patterns section for each type with styling guidelines), updated tool descriptions, overview, architecture diagram, data flow, Sandpack tradeoffs, SOLID section. Recharts remains available as a dependency but is not the default or only option.

prompt: Implement Phase 1 of the Rebolt AI MVP. Reference SPEC.md for all code — write files exactly as specified. Dependencies install, types/, db/, auth (proxy.ts, callback, layout), lib/api.ts, globals.css, .env.local.example, error-boundary.tsx.
notes: Phase 1 complete. Installed 15 production + 3 dev dependencies. Created 7 type files, 2 db files, drizzle.config.ts, proxy.ts, auth callback, root layout with AuthKitProvider + 3 fonts (Inter/Manrope/Geist Mono), withAuthHandler HOF, globals.css with Shadcn light theme tokens, ErrorBoundary class component, .env.local.example. Fixed NotFoundError missing message field in errorResponse(), fixed @workos-inc/node import (used UserInfo from authkit-nextjs instead). Generated Drizzle migration. Zero type errors.

prompt: Move to src/ folder structure. + Remove standalone /app references from docs.
notes: Moved app/, types/, lib/, services/, hooks/, components/, db/ into src/. Updated tsconfig.json path alias to ./src/*, drizzle.config.ts schema path to ./src/db/schema.ts. Updated all bare directory references in CLAUDE.md, strategy.md, README.md to use src/ prefix. Cleared stale .next cache. proxy.ts stays at root (Next.js 16 requirement). Zero type errors after move.

prompt: Fix Drizzle pgTable deprecation warning — extraConfig third parameter should return array instead of object.
notes: Updated conversations, messages, and files table definitions to use new array syntax for extraConfig: (table) => [...] instead of (table) => ({...}). Drizzle 0.45+ deprecation fix.

prompt: Implement Phase 2 of the Rebolt AI MVP. Services layer (conversations, files, messages, ai) and API routes (conversations CRUD, upload). All services return Result<T, E>.
notes: Phase 2 complete. Created 4 service files: conversations.ts (CRUD with Result pattern), files.ts (validation + CSV/XLSX parsing via Papa Parse and SheetJS), messages.ts (transactional persistence), ai.ts (title generation with gpt-5.4-nano structured output). Created 3 API route files: conversations route (GET list + POST create), conversations/[id] route (GET detail + DELETE), upload route (validate → parse → Vercel Blob → DB metadata). All routes wrapped in withAuthHandler, errors mapped via errorResponse. Committed on feat/phase-2-services-and-api branch. Zero type errors.

prompt: Implement Phase 3 of the Rebolt AI MVP. System prompts (buildAnalysisPrompt + buildCodegenPrompt) and POST /api/chat route with streamText, analyzeData + generateArtifact tools, multi-model routing. + Refactor tools out of route into lib/tools.ts for SOLID compliance.
notes: Phase 3 complete. Created lib/system-prompt.ts (analysis prompt for gpt-4.1-mini with tool chain strategy, codegen prompt for gpt-5.3-codex with UI patterns and styling guidelines). Created lib/tools.ts (createChatTools factory — analyzeData + generateArtifact with multi-model routing via generateText inside execute). Created app/api/chat/route.ts (thin route: validate → auth → fetch context → streamText with tools → toUIMessageStreamResponse). Fixed 3 type issues: AI SDK uses stopWhen+stepCountIs instead of maxSteps, Result narrowing for fileResult, explicit row typing. Refactored tools out of route into lib/tools.ts for Single Responsibility. Route went from 83 to 35 lines. Zero type errors.
